name: Aduh 9 April Udah Dekat
lore:
Lore of Aduh 9 April Udah Dekat
                                    


Aduh 9 April Udah Dekat is an Indonesian Brainrot made by @akunpenipu1294. It is a representation of the number 9 as a monster, terrorizing kids at a school. It is considered that he only appears on April 9th, due to April 9th being the day where school starts in Indonesia.
Fun Fact
If you √9 it's 3 like 9/3=3 haha funny joke 🫩
Lyrics
Original (Indonesian)
Aduh 9 April udah dekat ih seramnya! 9 April dah deket buat kalian yang lagi mudik cepatlah pulang, buat yang nggak mudik udahlah nggak usah mudik mending kalian belajar ajalah sana tolol, dan karena 9 April udah deket gausahlah balikan sama mantan yang putus pas puasa mentangmentang 9 April udah nggak puasa malah balikan bikin tolol aja Jeng, buat yang izin sakit pas 9 April nggak usah alasan cok gua tahu lu ada PR yang belum dikerjain makanya enggak berangkat dan malah Scroll tiktok dirumah udah dikasih libur panjang malah ngelunjak buat kalian yang PRnya belum dikerjain Cepatlah kerjain waduh PR Mimin belum selesai ih macam mana ini.
Translated (English)
Oh my, April 9th is so close, how scary! April 9th is near, for those of you who are going home, hurry up and go home, for those of you who are not going home, don't go home, you better study, idiot, and because April 9th is near, don't bother going back to your ex who broke up with you while fasting, just because you're not fasting on April 9th, you're going back to being stupid, Jeng, for those of you who are taking sick leave on April 9th, don't make excuses, I know you have homework that you haven't done, that's why you didn't go and instead scrolled through TikTok at home, you've been given a long holiday but you're sneaking around, for those of you whose homework hasn't been done, hurry up and do it, oh my, my homework isn't finished, what's going on?
